T0525.title: Idempotency
T0525.definition: A property that allows repeated requests with the same intent to produce the same business result without duplicate side effects.
T0525.description: Idempotency is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0525.usageExample: Assess Idempotency related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
